summary: Iteration 220 - Trade Circle Orbital & Codex Orbital Testing Complete. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: TradeCircleOrbital with center sun 'Trade Circle', 10 orbital planets (category nodes + stats/escrow/forge/genesis/karma), detail panels with listing data. CodexOrbital with center sun 'Sovereign Codex', 8 section planets, deep-dive recursion working (L1 depth indicator), tier indicator 'Archivist'. ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE has Trade Orbital and Codex Orbital action links. Locked nodes (Cosmic Forge, Genesis Mint) correctly show opacity 0.2 and 'locked' text.

ui_bugs.issue: Full Trade View button click intercepted by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay
ui_bugs.workaround: Button exists and is functional via JS click, needs z-index adjustment or badge repositioning

ui_bugs.issue: Page shows loading spinner when navigating directly without fresh auth session
ui_bugs.workaround: Works correctly when navigating from authenticated session

action_items: Consider adjusting z-index of 'Full Trade View' button or repositioning 'Made with Emergent' badge to prevent click interception (same issue as iteration 219)
critical_code_review_comments: OrbitalHubBase.js: Gravitational pull zones implemented correctly - computeGravitationalDamping uses quadratic curve (0.05 at surface, 1.0 at pullRadius)
OrbitalHubBase.js: Fly-in animation for deep-dive transitions sets flyingIn state, animates target to (0,0), calls onPlanetSelect after 500ms
OrbitalHubBase.js: Depth breadcrumbs show L0, L1 indicators during recursion with back button
OrbitalHubBase.js: Locked nodes correctly use requiredBit property to check hexagram.bits array
OrbitalHubBase.js: Pointer-events layering correct - nodes have auto, visual effects have none
TradeCircleOrbital.js: Generates category planets from actual listings data (goods, services, botanical, frequency_recipe, etc.)
TradeCircleOrbital.js: Market Stats, Escrow, Karma orbit nodes present
TradeCircleOrbital.js: Cosmic Forge (requiredBit: 4) and Genesis Mint (requiredBit: 5) correctly locked
TradeCircleOrbital.js: TradeDetailPanel shows listing items with title, mass, and visual_scale
CodexOrbital.js: Section planets generated from API sections (botany, elements, navigation, trade, mechanics, mastery, mathematics, resonance)
CodexOrbital.js: Deep-dive recursion uses diveStack array to track levels
CodexOrbital.js: CodexDetailPanel shows entries with 'Deep Dive' button for sections with subPlanets
CodexOrbital.js: Tier indicator (Archivist) shown in bottom-left
MissionControl.js: Trade Orbital and Codex Orbital action links present and functional
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 220 verified: (1) /trade-orbital route renders TradeCircleOrbital with center sun 'Trade Circle' and 10 orbiting planets (category nodes from listings + stats/escrow/forge/genesis/karma). (2) Trade Orbital category planets generated from actual listings data (frequency_recipe, botanical, phonetic_mantra, other, goods). (3) Cosmic Forge (bit 4) and Genesis Mint (bit 5) nodes correctly locked with opacity 0.2 and 'locked' text. (4) TradeDetailPanel opens on planet click showing listing items with title, mass, visual_scale. (5) /codex-orbital route renders CodexOrbital with center sun 'Sovereign Codex' and 8 section planets (botany, elements, navigation, trade, mechanics, mastery, mathematics, resonance). (6) Deep-dive recursion works - clicking section planet with subPlanets triggers fly-in animation, section becomes new sun with entries as planets. (7) Depth breadcrumbs show L0, L1 during recursion with back button. (8) Tier indicator 'Archivist' shown in bottom-left. (9) ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE has Trade Orbital and Codex Orbital action links. (10) CosmicSparkline overlay in top-right on all orbital pages. (11) Full View buttons link to /trade-circle and /codex (badge overlay issue persists). (12) Gravitational pull zones implemented - orbit slows when cursor near planet (quadratic damping curve). (13) HexagramGlitch wraps orbital canvas when hexagram is transitioning.
